## Checklist

- [ ] `composer preflight` passes (tests, PHPStan, code style, PHPMD, complexity)
- [ ] New/changed code has unit tests
- [ ] PHPDoc types are accurate (PHPStan level 10)
- [ ] `declare(strict_types=1)` in all new PHP files
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the diff
- [ ] Documentation updated (if public API changed)
